summary: Tested KYC Document Upload component (AdvancedDocumentUpload.js) fix for camera/gallery button functionality. All tests PASS - the fix correctly implements TWO separate file inputs: one with capture='environment' for camera (opens native camera app) and one without capture attribute for gallery (opens file picker).
critical_code_review_comments: AdvancedDocumentUpload.js: Lines 266-274 - Camera input correctly has capture='environment' attribute which tells mobile browsers to use native camera app
AdvancedDocumentUpload.js: Lines 277-284 - Gallery input correctly has NO capture attribute, ensuring it opens file picker instead of camera
AdvancedDocumentUpload.js: Lines 24-26 - Separate refs (cameraInputRef, galleryInputRef) for each input type
AdvancedDocumentUpload.js: Lines 29-40 - Separate handler functions (handleCameraCapture, handleGallerySelect) that trigger the correct input
AdvancedDocumentUpload.js: Lines 388-415 - Buttons have correct data-testid attributes (use-camera-btn, use-gallery-btn)
seed_data_creation: Created test user kyctest@test.com for KYC testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: KYC Document Upload fix verified. The AdvancedDocumentUpload component now has TWO separate file inputs - camera input with capture='environment' (for native camera) and gallery input without capture attribute (for file picker). This is the standard mobile-web pattern for reliable camera/gallery access. Note: Full camera/gallery functionality can only be tested on actual mobile devices - browser automation can only verify the DOM structure is correct.

camera_input.status: PASS - has capture='environment' for native camera

gallery_input.status: PASS - NO capture attribute for file picker

fix_verification.original_bug: Camera showed black screen, Gallery button incorrectly opened camera instead of file picker
fix_verification.fix_applied: Replaced getUserMedia-based camera implementation with native HTML5 file inputs - one with capture='environment' for camera and one without capture for gallery
fix_verification.verification_result: PASS - DOM structure confirms TWO separate file inputs with correct attributes
